review_questions: Does P4-SPEC-01 correctly bind the approved P3 build lock and review decision as upstream authority?
Does the program driver and DAG model stay orchestration-only and avoid product semantic authority?
Does the drdctl command surface stay thin, deterministic, and gated before review, lock, release, and invalidation boundaries?
Do the PRD Harness and Markdown adapters preserve source evidence without creating product requirements or business contracts?
Does this candidate avoid repository implementation, P4 locks, release lock creation, P3 mutation, root P4 file mutation, commit, and push?
